allow: Bash(git -c user.name=Claude -c user.email=noreply@anthropic.com commit -q -m 'Add design spec: Budget login + PostgreSQL storage *)

Bash(node -e "const b=require\('bcrypt'\); const h=b.hashSync\('test123',12\); console.log\('bcrypt OK, hash len', h.length, 'verify', b.compareSync\('test123',h\)\); require\('express'\); require\('pg'\); require\('express-session'\); require\('connect-pg-simple'\); require\('express-rate-limit'\); require\('dotenv'\); console.log\('all modules load OK'\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); require\('./server/db'\); require\('./server/auth'\); require\('./server/data'\); require\('./server/app'\); require\('./server/seed'\); require\('./server/validate'\); console.log\('All server modules parse and load OK'\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const {Pool}=require\('pg'\); const p=new Pool\({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL}\); p.query\('SELECT current_database\(\) db, current_user usr'\).then\(r=>{console.log\('CONNECTED:', r.rows[0]\); return p.end\(\);}\).catch\(e=>{console.log\('CONN_FAIL:', e.message\); process.exit\(2\);}\);")
Bash(git -c user.name=Claude -c user.email=noreply@anthropic.com commit -q -m 'Add Node/Express backend: signup/login + per-user PostgreSQL storage *)
